segments.step_label: Place the agarose gel into the gel box (electrophoresis unit).

steps.text: The person move the agarose gel into the gel box

segments.step_label: Fill gel box with TAE until the gel is covered.

steps.text: The person opens the valve of the buffer container to fill the gel box with TAE buffer until buffer covers the gel.
[Not visible: ...] The person raises the gel box probably to check the buffer level
The person fills in the gel box some more buffer

segments.step_label: Mix the DNA sample with Loading buffer at 1:25 dilution ratio.
segments.equipment: Benchtop centrifuge, ice bucket, tube rack

steps.text: The person centrifuge the tube strip with samples on a benchtop centrifuge for a few seconds.
The person added Loading buffer to DNA sample at 1:25 dilution ratio.
The person shakes the tube strip to mix the buffer and DNA sample.
The person briefly centrifuge the tube strip to collect all samples at the bottom of the tubes.

segments.step_label: Load 5 μL of DNA ladder and samples into wells.
segments.materials: agarose gel, DNA ladder, DNA sample

steps.text: The person loads 5uL of DNA ladder to the first well of the agarose gel
The person loads 5uL of the first DNA sample to the second well of the agarose gel
The person loads 5uL of the second DNa sample to the third well of the agarose gel
The person load 5uL of the third DNA sample to the fourth well of the agarose gel
The person load 5uL of the fourth DNA sample to the fifth well of the agarose gel

segments.step_label: Run the gel at 100 V until the dye line is approximately 75-80% of the way down the gel.

steps.text: The person attaches the power supply to the gel box and run the gel at 100V
The person turns off the gel box and detaches the power supply

segments.step_label: Visualize the DNA fragments with LED.

steps.text: The person moves the agarose gel from the gel box to the imaging chamber
The person turns on the imaging chamber to visualize DNA bands.
